present_elements: light canvas background with thin border
light blue ground band

gray belly ellipse
gray head ellipse

layout.ground band: lower left to lower right, bottom of the frame

layout.feet: lower center, at the base of the body

species_trait.teacher_change: The teacher render changes the penguin to a dark body and head with a white belly while preserving the pose and background.
